specific_question: In Q3 2025, how many virtual multidisciplinary care team members at MediConn Solutions had completed the targeted online training modules for fistula management?
answer: According to internal data, between July 1 and September 30, 2025, 95 out of 130 targeted care team members had completed the fistula management online training modules
dr_question: In 2026, how can MediConn Solutions use its virtual knowledge management platform to deliver targeted continuous training for healthcare professionals in multidisciplinary care teams, addressing knowledge gaps and improving patient care outcomes in head and neck cancer management?
